39 candidate events matched AI-relevance keywords across 1 source type.

Read, decide which deserve a verified entry in [`events/current.json`](../events/current.json), and commit. Stubs not worth tracking can be ignored — they're already deduped via `digest/.seen.json`.

### Sam Altman didn’t need another lawsuit

- **Source:** The Verge AI
- **Published:** 2026-07-14T14:01:07.000Z
- **Link:** https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/965294/openai-apple-trade-secrets-lawsuit-sam-altman-ipo
